page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for: PLCY388 or PUAF388.

Formerly: PUAF388.

PLCY396 Fellowship Program in Political Leadership (2-6 Credits) Individual instruction course.

Prerequisite: Permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy. Restriction: Must be enrolled in the full-time fellowship program. Credit Only Granted for. PLCY396 or PUAF396.
